title: Thelypteris caudata
taxonomy: Thelypteris caudata belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns. This species is further classified as a member of the genus Thelypteris, a group of deciduous and evergreen ferns. Thelypteris caudata is also classified as a member of the order Polypodiales, which includes a wide range of ferns. The species is native to various regions, including Central and South America, and the Caribbean. Thelypteris caudata's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the fern family.
